name: Oyster HR Global Employment API
what_it_does: Global Employer of Record (EOR) platform with REST API for hiring full-time employees in 180+ countries without legal entity setup — handling employment contracts, payroll, benefits, and compliance with API integration for HRIS systems.
use_cases: Onboarding international employees via API without establishing local legal entities
Syncing global employee data with HRIS systems via REST API
Managing contractor-to-employee conversions through EOR programmatically
Querying global payroll and employment costs for financial planning
Automating employee offboarding workflows across multiple countries via API
not_for: Contractor management (EOR is for full-time employment — use specialized contractor tools)
Companies with existing legal entities in target countries (use local payroll)
Teams wanting pure API-first EOR without sales engagement
best_when: A company needs to hire full-time employees in countries where they have no legal entity, with HRIS integration via API and focus on employee experience.
avoid_when: You employ contractors (not employees), have established entities, or need API access without going through Oyster's enterprise sales.

auth.notes: OAuth2 with scoped access tokens. Client credentials for M2M integration. Workspace-scoped access. Token management for partner integrations. API access via partner program or enterprise plan.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; enterprise pricing per employee
pricing.paid_tiers: EOR from $499/employee/month; Scale plan discounts for volume
pricing.notes: Per-employee monthly pricing. US-based unicorn (Global Work from Anywhere). API via partner integrations. 180+ countries. Focus on compliance and employee experience. B Corp certified. Strong HRIS integration partnerships (Workday, BambooHR, etc.).

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for employee management, contracts, and payroll data. OAuth2 with scopes for HRIS integration. Webhook support for employment lifecycle events. API primarily for integration partners. Employee onboarding involves legal review — not fully automatable.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Employee record reads idempotent. Onboarding operations sequential — partial idempotency. Status queries always idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: API access requires partner program or enterprise contract — not self-serve
Employee onboarding involves legal review steps — not fully automatable via API
Country-specific employment law affects data models and required fields
Sensitive employee PII requires strong data governance

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant. OAuth2 with scopes. Employee PII handled with enterprise security. US and EU data residency. B Corp certified — ethical data practices. Annual contract security review process.
